OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-21-1998, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $100.00 FOR FAILURE TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO FIEL POS, OBTAIN ANSWER AND OR ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT OSC AND SANCTIONS TO PLTF'S ATTORNEY RORY W CLARK WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE NOV-05-1998 CONTINUED FROM OCT-21-1998 TO DEC-02-1998 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
